title: Supervise and audit tree operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise and audit tree operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare site and equipment

pcs.text: Confirm tree operations, schedule of works and desired outcomes with client brief and arborist specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm tree operations, schedule of works and desired outcomes with client brief and arborist specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm tree operations, schedule of works and desired outcomes with client brief and arborist specifications.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Assess site access conditions for equipment and personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site access conditions for equipment and personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site access conditions for equipment and personnel.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure pruning tools, equipment and machinery comply with operation specification, planned works and site assessment.
